resources.title: The RevOps Maturity Model for B2B SaaS
resources.description: A practical framework to assess where your revenue operations function stands today — and a clear roadmap to get to the next level. Covers people, process, data, and systems across five maturity stages.

resources.title: The 50-Point CRM Audit Checklist
resources.description: Before you blame the CRM, audit it. This checklist walks through data hygiene, pipeline configuration, workflow logic, and adoption gaps that silently kill revenue visibility.

resources.title: Building AI-Native GTM Workflows in 2025
resources.description: A practical guide to layering AI tools (Clay, n8n, HeyReach, LLMs) into your GTM motion without breaking your existing processes. Includes real workflow templates and tool stack recommendations.

resources.title: The Lead-to-Cash Diagnostic Guide
resources.description: Map every handoff in your revenue process — from first touch to closed invoice — and identify exactly where deals are leaking. Includes a diagnostic template you can run in one afternoon.

resources.title: The Customer Success Expansion Playbook
resources.description: How to systematically identify, trigger, and close expansion revenue within your existing customer base. Covers health scoring, QBR design, and CS-to-Sales handoff frameworks.

resources.title: Why Your GTM Team Needs FP&A Thinking
resources.description: Most GTM leaders treat finance as a reporting function. The best ones use FP&A as a planning weapon. This post covers how to bring financial rigour into your go-to-market without slowing down execution.
